biography.text:
Sleman Receh is a music group from Sleman, Yogyakarta, formed in late 2019. In 2022, with a new lineup, they continued to focus on releasing original works with a pop-dangdut musical style.

Organized and supported by Suara Serta Ria.

Official YouTube Channel: Slemanreceh Official.
